use_cases: Displaying keyboard shortcuts in macOS-style tutorials
Showing command palette shortcuts in productivity apps
Illustrating keyboard navigation hints in documentation
Demonstrating app-specific hotkeys in onboarding flows
Creating visual keyboard shortcut guides for software documentation
ai_summary: A macOS-inspired animated keyboard shortcut display component featuring individual key caps with icons and labels. The component renders a row of stylized keyboard keys that respond to hover interactions with subtle glow effects, mimicking the polished aesthetic of macOS system preferences. Ideal for displaying keyboard shortcuts, command palette references, or tutorial walkthroughs in productivity and developer tool applications.
